name: create-next-pro-cli
description: Advanced Next.js project scaffolder with i18n, Tailwind, App Router and more.
author: MrRise

scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown .github/workflows/ci.yml bunfig.toml bin.bun.ts bin.node.ts src tsup.config.ts eslint.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.node.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --ignore-unknown .github/workflows/ci.yml bunfig.toml bin.bun.ts bin.node.ts src tsup.config.ts eslint.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.node.json
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:node && bun run build:bun && cp scripts/create-next-pro dist/create-next-pro && chmod +x dist/create-next-pro
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build
scripts.git-fullpush: bun run build && git add -A && bun commit && git push origin master && bun version-patch
